meaning: n.干线,树干,躯干,箱子,主干,象鼻vt.把...放入旅行箱内adj.树干的,躯干的,干线的,箱形的
examples: I closed and roped the trunk.
The tree trunk was hollow inside.
The leg to be stretched should be positioned behind your trunk with your knee bent.
The tiny little trunk holds just 7.1 cubic feet of junk, and access is tight.
The main trunk had been scarred by claw marks up to a height of five feet.
